theme_and_concept.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Jewel & Luxury
theme_and_concept.rationale: Founders don't want friendly chat interfaces; they want an engine that produces structured, actionable truth. The dark theme signals focus and deep work, while the structured bento grid provides immediate scannability.

headings.usage: Hero headers, card titles, primary metrics.
headings.rationale: Geometric, highly legible, but distinct from standard SaaS defaults.

body.rationale: Clean, structural, excellent legibility in dark mode.

mono.usage: Overlines, metrics, confidence scores, technical execution steps, tags.
mono.rationale: Injects a 'Terminal/Engine' aesthetic that reinforces the idea of algorithmic precision.

scale_and_classes.hero_title: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-outfit font-light tracking-tighter text-white

rules.no_gradients: Avoid generic sweeping full-screen background gradients. Rely on solid dark colors with extremely subtle radial glows behind key components (like the input field).
rules.tinted_blacks: Never use pure #000000. Base background is #0A0A0B (Obsidian) for depth.
rules.contrast: Text must meet 4.5:1 ratio. Secondary text on surface should be Zinc-400 (#A1A1AA).

app_structure.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0B] flex flex-col hidden md:flex
app_structure.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0B] relative

bento_grid_protocol.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8 w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto
bento_grid_protocol.spacing: Internal card padding MUST be generous. Minimum p-6, ideally p-8.

cards.style: Technical Grid style. Flat background (#121214), sharp or very subtly rounded corners (rounded-lg maximum). 1px solid border (border-white/10). No drop shadows, rely on borders for definition.
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border transitions to white/20, subtle inner glow.
cards.header: Each card must have a top header with an icon (Phosphor), an overline, and a divider line.

main_prompt.style: Massive, immersive textarea. bg-[#121214] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 text-lg text-white font-manrope placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500/50 transition-all resize-none shadow-[inset_0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
main_prompt.button: Absolute positioned bottom-right. Solid Amber background, black text. pill-shaped (rounded-full) or sharp.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-black font-outfit font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors
buttons.workflow_prompt: border border-white/10 bg-transparent text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:border-amber-500/50 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-manrope text-left transition-all flex items-start gap-3
buttons.smart_action: border border-white/10 bg-[#121214] text-xs font-jetbrains text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded transition-all

pwa_banner.style: Sticky top or bottom floating pill. Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 text-sm py-2 px-4 rounded-full flex items-center gap-4 text-white z-50 shadow-2xl

skeletons.style: Do NOT use default grey pulse. Use dark background (#121214) with a shimmering linear gradient mask (white/5) that moves left to right. It should feel like an engine processing, not a webpage loading.

entrance.bento_cards: Staggered fade-up. Initial: opacity 0, y 20. Animate: opacity 1, y 0. Stagger delay: 0.1s.

transitions.layout: Use framer-motion layout prop for smooth transitions when the input area moves from center screen to the top after submission.

micro_interactions.hover: Scale elements slightly (1.02) and brighten borders. DO NOT use 'transition-all', only transition specific properties (border-color, transform, background-color).

landing_state.layout: Center-aligned content within the main area. Massive left-aligned typography. Input box dead center, taking up 80% width max.
landing_state.elements: Hero Title, Subtitle, 4 Workflow Prompts (arranged in a 2x2 grid below the input).

output_state.layout: Input shrinks and moves to the top (sticky or static header). Bento grid populates below it.
output_state.smart_actions: A row of small buttons directly below the grid for 'Regenerate', 'Make Aggressive', etc.

offline_fallback.style: Minimalist dark screen. Large Phosphor 'WifiSlash' icon. 'System Offline. Cannot connect to Execution Engine.' text in JetBrains Mono.

critical_rules: NEVER build a chat interface. No chat bubbles, no 'User:' vs 'AI:' avatars. Input goes in, structured Dashboard comes out.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override their styles to match the 'Obsidian & Amber' technical look.
Card components must NOT have the default Shadcn white background or heavy drop shadows. They must be #121214 with a subtle 1px border-white/10.
Implement the Bento Grid exactly as defined in grids_and_layouts. Use proper Tailwind Grid classes.
All text within the Output cards must use proper typography hierarchy (Outfit for headers, Manrope for body, JetBrains Mono for numbers/tags).
Implement error handling via a specific Bento Card that turns red (border-red-500/50, text-red-400) when guardrails block a prompt.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
